title: Create feature_insights.py — SHAP values and feature importance analysis
acceptance_criteria: Loads trained XGBoost and Random Forest models from train_classical.py
Computes SHAP values for XGBoost model on the test set
Extracts and plots top-N most important features from Random Forest (feature_importances_)
Saves SHAP summary plot to figures/shap_summary.png
Saves RF feature importance bar chart to figures/rf_feature_importance.png
Prints top 10 features ranked by importance with their scores
Installs shap if not already available
